mapper.select: SELECT #{reqDate} || LPAD( (COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(APPROVAL_REQ_ID, 9, 3) AS INT)), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 3, '0' ) FROM mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_REQ WHERE REQ_DATE = #{reqDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_BULK_JOB_REQ ( APPROVAL_REQ_ID, USER_CD, USER_NM, START_DATE, END_DATE, ACCOUNT_NO, USER_ID, CUST_REG_NO, TEL_NO, USER_IP, ORG_FILE_NM, U_FILE_NM, BATCH_YN, APPLY_YN ) VALUES ( #{approvalReqId}, #{userCd}, #{userNm}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{accountNo}, #{userId}, #{custRegNo}, #{telNo}, #{userIp}, #{orgFileNm}, #{uFileNm}, 'N', 'N' )

INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_APPROVAL_REQ ( USER_CD, APPROVAL_DIV_CD, APPROVAL_REQ_ID, NAME, APPROVAL_REQ_REASON, REQ_DATE, AUTH, EXPIRE_DATE, BRC, BRNM, OFT_C, OFT, PROGRAM_ID, PROGRAM_NM ) VALUES ( #{userCd}, #{approvalDivCd}, #{approvalReqId}, #{name}, #{approvalReqReason}, #{reqDate}, '', '', #{brc}, #{brnm}, #{oftC}, #{oft}, #{programId}, (SELECT MENU_NM FROM mhdb.TB_MENU WHERE MENU_URL ILIKE concat('%', #{programId}, '%') LIMIT 1) )
